news.headline: Dow Jones rises, Tesla jumps after Musk's boast, Nvidia fights back in AI stock market. Trump stock surges.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones experienced a slight increase on the stock market. Elon Musk made a bold statement regarding AI, while Nvidia's stock showed resilience. Additionally, a stock associated with Donald Trump saw notable growth. Tesla also saw a notable increase following Musk's announcement. The news coverage highlights the gains in the Dow Jones, the recovery of Nvidia's stock, and the positive performance of Tesla in response to Elon Musk's statement.

news.headline: Tesla stock surges before Q2 deliveries; Dow Jones expects rise. Fed Chair Powell to speak.
news.summary: Tesla stock experienced a significant surge on Monday in anticipation of the Q2 deliveries, as reflected in the Dow Jones Futures. The Federal Reserve Chairman, Jerome Powell, is scheduled to deliver a speech on Tuesday. This news was covered by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Amerant Bank appoints Jesse Flowers as Palm Beach Market President ahead of opening third banking center in Q1 2025.
news.summary: A new Market President has joined Amerant following the recent announcement of its plans to open its third Palm Beach banking center and regional office in the first quarter of 2025. This move signifies Amerant's strategic expansion in the region, highlighting its commitment to growth and presence in Palm Beach. The addition of the new Market President reflects Amerant's focus on strengthening its leadership team to drive the company's initiatives forward. This development underscores Amerant's objective to enhance its market position and services in Palm Beach, further solidifying its foothold in the area.

news.headline: PG&E prepares for high temperatures, possible outages. Staff closely monitoring weather. Customers provided resources to stay safe.
news.summary: As PG&E monitors the weather closely, the company is providing customers with tools to stay safe and comfortable during the upcoming Fourth of July holiday. Based in Oakland, California, PG&E's meteorologists are working diligently to ensure customers are prepared for any weather-related challenges.

news.headline: Tapioca market to grow by $44.2 million from 2024-2028, CAGR 4.42%, due to demand as a gluten and grain alternative.
news.summary: As of July 1, 2024, the global market for tapioca is projected to increase by approximately USD 44.2 million between 2024 and 2028, as per research from Technavio. This market is expected to experience a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.42% over the forecasted period. The surge in popularity is attributed to tapioca serving as a substitute for gluten and grains in food products.

news.headline: CrossFirst Bankshares, Inc. to hold Q2 2024 earnings call.
Tiena Johnson Hall chosen for FHFA Advisory Committee on Affordable Housing. 20 national experts to advise FHFA on policy, rulemaking.
news.summary: In Sacramento, California, Tiena Johnson Hall, Executive Director of the California Housing Finance Agency, has been chosen by the Federal Housing Finance Agency to be part of a select group of 20 national housing experts on the Advisory Committee on Affordable, Equitable and Sustainable Housing. This committee, as announced by FHFA, will play a crucial role in shaping policies, regulations, and engaging with the community and the public. FHFA, the organization overseeing Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac, is empowering these leaders to contribute to creating affordable and sustainable housing solutions.

news.headline: Arcade1Up introduces NBA Jam Deluxe pre-orders on Amazon, expanding its retro gaming offerings.
news.summary: Today, in Miami on July 1, 2024, Arcade1Up, a prominent brand known for retro home arcade machines and interactive entertainment, revealed the launch of its latest product, the NBA Jam Deluxe arcade machine. This exciting new item is now up for pre-order on Amazon, specifically featured in the Gaming Zone 3D Showcase. Customers can not only find it on Amazon but also in various retail outlets.

news.headline: Ceramide market to grow by USD 148.5 million from 2024-2028, fueled by geriatric population rise - Technavio.
news.summary: According to research by Technavio, the worldwide ceramide market is projected to increase by USD 148.5 million between 2024 and 2028. It is expected to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of nearly 6.2% during this period. One of the key drivers of this growth is the rising number of elderly individuals in the population.

news.headline: Global flower and ornamental plants market to increase by $37.8B from 2024-2028 at a CAGR of 6.69%, driven by aesthetic use.
news.summary: As of July 1, 2024, it has been reported that the flower and ornamental plants market worldwide is projected to increase by approximately USD 37.8 billion between 2024 and 2028, based on data from Technavio. This market is expected to exhibit a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.69% throughout the forecast period. The rise in demand for flowers and plants for various purposes is believed to be a driving force behind this growth trajectory.

news.headline: Omnissa is now an independent software company with $1.5 billion annual revenue, after being acquired by KKR for $4 billion.
news.summary: A new chapter begins for Omnissa, headquartered in Palo Alto, California, as it emerges as a standalone software company and premier digital work platform provider. With an impressive $1.5 billion in annual recurring revenue and a substantial customer base of 26,000 worldwide, Omnissa's position in the industry is solidified. This transformation comes after global investment giant KKR finalized the acquisition of Omnissa from Broadcom Inc. for a significant sum of around $4 billion. Despite the ownership shift, Omnissa will maintain continuity in leadership with CEO Shankar Iyer at the helm, supported by the existing management team overseeing 4,000 employees.

news.headline: Motorola Solutions buys Noggin, a provider of CEM software, for resilience and event response. Headquarters in Sydney.
news.summary: Motorola Solutions (NYSE: MSI) has recently purchased Noggin, a leading worldwide supplier of cloud-based solutions for business continuity planning, operational resilience, and critical event management (CEM) software. Based in Sydney, Australia, Noggin serves a diverse international clientele. Their software aids organizations and vital infrastructure in forecasting, readying for, and effectively managing incidents. Noggin's inclusive software platform features adaptable workflows and checklists to streamline response procedures.

news.headline: Alibaba and BYD aim to convert football fans into shoppers, partnering in a strategic move.
DIRTT appoints Scott Robinson as Board Chair, enhancing leadership in industrialized construction sector.
news.summary: On July 01, 2024, DIRTT Environmental Solutions Ltd., a leading company in industrialized construction, appointed Scott Robinson as the new Board Chair. The company, listed on TSX as DRT and OTC as DRTTF, made this significant announcement from its headquarters in Calgary, Alberta. Scott Robinson's election marks a strategic move for the company as it continues to strengthen its leadership team.

news.headline: Vision Sensing Acquisition Corp plans to extend its initial business combination deadline to August 3, 2024.
news.summary: Vision Sensing Acquisition Corp. has declared its plan to extend the timeframe for finalizing its initial business merger until August 3, 2024.

news.headline: New America High Income Fund (NYSE: HYB) declared a dividend of $0.04 per share, to be paid on July 31, 2024 for shareholders on record by July 17, 2024.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, the New America High Income Fund, Inc. revealed plans to distribute a dividend of $0.04 per share to common stockholders on July 31, 2024. Shareholders as of July 17, 2024, will receive the payment, with the ex-dividend date also set for July 17th. The Fund is listed on NYSE under the symbol HYB.

news.headline: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin rise in value in July. Important numbers: Bitcoin $63,258 (+2.1%), Ethereum $3,470 (+1.3%), Dogecoin $0.125 (+1%). Bitcoin's large transaction volume down 16%, daily active addresses decreased by 7.7%, and exchanges netflows dropped by 114.6%. 37,524 traders were liquidated for $124.3 million in 24 hours. Germany experienced largest capital outflow at $28.5 million.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency markets are on the rise as miner selling slows down. Here are the latest prices and gains:- Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is at $63,258.20, up by 2.1%- Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) stands at $3,470.03, showing a gain of 1.3%- Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) has reached $147.22, with an increase of 1.8%- Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) trades at $0.125, reflecting a 1% rise- Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) is priced at $0.00001723, up by 1.3%Key statistics reveal a drop in Bitcoin metrics: a 16% decrease in large transaction volume, a 7.7% drop in daily active addresses, and a significant 114.6% decline in exchange netflows. Coinglass data points out Bitcoin's open interest hitting $33 billion, the highest in over a week. Over the last day, 37,524 traders were liquidated, resulting in losses of $124.3 million. Noteworthy outflows of $28.5 million were seen in Germany. For more details, find the complete story on financial news sites.

news.headline: Root Insurance and Chip Ganassi Racing team up for a special livery revealing for Marcus Armstrong on July 7th at Mid-Ohio Race.
news.summary: Racing fans can expect to see INDYCAR driver Marcus Armstrong showcasing a unique design on his No. 11 Root Honda at the upcoming Mid-Ohio Race scheduled for July 7th. This special livery is set to make a statement during the event, enhancing the visual appeal of Armstrong's vehicle. The race, which will take place on July 7th, will provide a platform for Armstrong to display this distinctive look to a wide audience of spectators and enthusiasts. Stay tuned for a memorable race day experience with Armstrong behind the wheel of the No. 11 Root Honda.

news.headline: Global dark chocolate market to grow by USD 36.03 billion from 2024-2028, with a CAGR of 9.45%. Health benefits drive growth.
news.summary: As of July 1, 2024, the global dark chocolate market is projected to expand significantly by USD 36.03 billion between 2024 and 2028, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 9.45% throughout this period. This growth is primarily attributed to the increasing recognition of the health advantages associated with dark chocolate.

news.headline: United Rentals stock hits 80+ RS Rating, clearing key benchmark, per Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: United Rentals has achieved an impressive Relative Strength Rating above 80. This milestone indicates strong performance compared to the overall market. The stock has surpassed a key benchmark, solidifying its status as a top performer. This news highlights United Rentals' success in the market.

news.headline: Nio, BYD, and Zeekr break records in EV sales; contrastingly, Tesla faces setbacks. Exciting growth in electric vehicle sector.
news.summary: Leading electric vehicle manufacturers Nio, BYD, and Zeekr all experienced a surge in sales during June and the second quarter of the year, achieving record-breaking numbers. Meanwhile, Tesla, a key player in the EV market, is speculated to have faced persisting challenges. This positive momentum for Nio, BYD, and Zeekr contrasts with potential setbacks for Tesla.

news.headline: Bitcoin prices rebound after Binance ruling. Stay updated on latest cryptocurrency news. via Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Stay updated on the current state of the cryptocurrency market with notable information. Bitcoin has shown a significant recovery as it bounced back following a ruling by Binance. Keep track of the latest developments in the industry. For more details, consult Investor's Business Daily for comprehensive coverage of cryptocurrency prices and news.

news.headline: Layered Reality partners with Technicolor Group's The Mill to create an immersive Elvis experience using AI. Oscars and BAFTAs won.
news.summary: The Mill, a part of the Technicolor Group, has been appointed to develop the most lifelike portrayal of Elvis through the utilization of artificial intelligence, led by Simon Reveley who heads the Layered Reality Studio. Known for their groundbreaking visual effects, especially in seamlessly replacing icons with computer-generated imagery, The Mill gained recognition by receiving both a BAFTA and an Oscar for their exceptional work on the film 'Gladiator'.

news.headline: DRiP Haus acquires Vault Music on Solana, becoming the primary on-chain music platform. AUSTIN, Texas, July 1, 2024.
news.summary: DRiP, a Solana-based creator platform, has recently acquired Vault Music, the limited-edition music platform on the Solana blockchain. This collaboration has positioned DRiP as the primary hub for on-chain music on Solana. This acquisition, announced on July 1, 2024 in Austin, Texas, marks a milestone in the music industry as it combines the strengths of both platforms to offer a comprehensive experience for users. The move consolidates a significant user base, now reaching a larger audience with access to unique music offerings on the blockchain.

news.headline: Whataburger reintroduces Buffalo Ranch Chicken Strip Sandwich for limited time from June 25, 2024.
news.summary: Beginning June 25 for a limited time, the Whataburger Buffalo Ranch Chicken Strip Sandwich will be reintroduced, featuring crispy chicken, spicy buffalo sauce, and cool buttermilk ranch in perfect harmony. This fan-favorite sandwich is highly anticipated and will be available at all locations.

news.headline: Hertz Global Holdings, Inc. will share Q2 2024 financial results on August 1 at 8:00 am ET, with an earnings call at 9:00 am ET.
news.summary: Hertz Global Holdings, Inc. disclosed that it will release its financial results for the second quarter of 2024 on August 1, 2024, at 8:00 a.m. ET, with an earnings call scheduled for 9:00 a.m. ET on the same day. The announcement was made in Estero, Florida. Hertz Global Holdings trades on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol HTZ. The earnings call will also be broadcast via a live webcast.

news.headline: Global cement additives market to grow by USD 10.38 billion from 2024-2028 at CAGR of 6.36%, driven by demand for plasticizers.
news.summary: As of July 1, 2024, the projected expansion of the worldwide cement additives market is approximately USD 10.38 billion between 2024 and 2028, as per Technavio's analysis. It is anticipated to exhibit a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.36% throughout the forecast period. This growth is primarily fueled by the rising need for plasticizers in the market.

news.headline: Erin Sheckler of Stewart Information Services wins HousingWire’s 2024 Women of Influence Award, part of 100 honorees.
news.summary: In Houston, Stewart Information Services Corporation (NYSE:STC) revealed that Erin Sheckler has been bestowed with the 2024 Woman of Influence Award by HousingWire. This prestigious award, celebrating its 15th year, recognizes 100 exceptional women who are influential in driving forward the mortgage, real estate, and fintech sectors. Sheckler, the Head of Stewart’s National Commercial Services division, is responsible for directing the company's national commercial operations, strategy, and expansion.

news.headline: Tammy Jones becomes first woman to serve as national senior VP of Paralyzed Veterans of America.
news.summary: Today, Tammy Jones made history by becoming the first woman to be appointed as the national senior vice president of Paralyzed Veterans of America, a leading nonprofit for disabled Veterans, their families, and caregivers. The organization is recognized as the top choice for these individuals, and this milestone marks a significant step towards gender diversity within its leadership team. Founded in [year], Paralyzed Veterans of America has been dedicated to supporting [number] of disabled Veterans across the nation.

news.headline: Global MOOCs market to grow by USD 80.53 billion from 2024-2028, CAGR of 52.7%, regional MOOCs boost market - Technavio.
news.summary: In New York on July 1, 2024, it was reported that the global market for Massive Open Online Courses (MOOCs) is projected to increase by USD 80.53 billion between 2024 and 2028, as revealed by Technavio. This market is expected to experience a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of more than 52.7% throughout the forecast period. The surge in regional MOOCs is a key factor propelling the expansion of this market, leading to significant growth in...

news.headline: Tethered drones market to grow by USD 24.9M from 2024-2028, with a projected CAGR of over 6.18%, driven by telecom demand.
news.summary: As of July 1, 2024, it is projected that the global market for tethered drones will experience a substantial increase of USD 24.9 million between 2024 and 2028, as reported by Technavio. The market is expected to exhibit a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) surpassing 6.18% throughout this forecast period. This growth trend is primarily driven by the rising demand for drones across various sectors.

news.headline: CoStar Group (NASDAQ: CSGP) to report Q2 2024 financial results on July 23; conference call at 5:00 PM EDT.
news.summary: CoStar Group, Inc., a prominent provider of online real estate marketplaces and analytics, will reveal its financial performance for Q2 of 2024 on July 23, 2024, after the market closes. Management will host a conference call at 5:00 PM EDT on the same day to delve into the results and discuss the company's future outlook. The conference call will be live-streamed via audio webcast for interested parties. CoStar Group, Inc. trades on the NASDAQ under the symbol CSGP.

news.headline: Keller Williams Realty appoints Cynthia, Alicia, Cody, and Rachel to key executive roles in commercial, coaching, and charity divisions.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Keller Williams Realty, Inc. (KW), the leading real estate franchise globally with the largest number of agents, revealed new executive appointments within KW Commercial, KW MAPS Coaching, and KW Cares, a philanthropic organization (501(c)(3)) aiding KW associates and their families. The recent appointments of Cynthia, Alicia, Cody, and Rachel aim to enhance support for market centers and agents, empowering entrepreneurs to prosper.

news.headline: StoneCo Ltd. starts cash tender offer to buy all outstanding 3.950% senior notes due 2028. Dates mentioned: July 1, 2024.
news.summary: Today, in George Town, Grand Cayman, StoneCo Ltd. (Nasdaq: STNE, B3: STOC31) has announced the initiation of a cash tender offer referred to as the "Tender Offer." This offer is aimed at acquiring all of its outstanding 3.950% senior notes due in 2028, known as the "Notes." The company invites holders of these Notes to participate in the tender offer.

news.headline: Partnership between Athena Oncology and IDEOlogy Health for customized medical education for providers.
news.summary: A national group of independent community oncology practices, Athena Oncology, based in Tulsa, Okla. and Austin, Texas, made public on July 1, 2024, that they have reached a formal agreement selecting IDEOlogy Health as the sole provider of multi-channel nonpromotional services. This recent collaboration between the two entities is significant industry news and marks a strategic decision for Athena Oncology moving forward.

news.headline: Global mens swimwear market set to grow by USD 1.78 billion from 2024-2028. Demand for long-sleeve swimsuits boosts market.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, it was reported that the global market for mens swimwear is expected to increase by approximately USD 1.78 billion between 2024 and 2028, as per Technavio. This growth is projected to occur at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.82% throughout the forecast period. The rise in demand for long-sleeve swimsuits for men is identified as a key driving factor for this growth.

news.headline: US banks may benefit from sustained high interest rates, with Goldman Sachs predicting 7% YoY revenue growth in Q2. JPMorgan Chase, Wells Fargo, Citigroup, and other major banks set to report earnings in July. Trading revenue expected to average 6% in Q2 and 3% for the year.
news.summary: The potential rise in interest rates is predicted to benefit U.S. banks, as stated by Goldman Sachs analyst Richard Ramsden, who remains cautiously optimistic about the upcoming second-quarter earnings season. Major banks like JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM), Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE:WFC), Citigroup Inc. (NYSE:C), and Bank Of New York Mellon Corp. (NYSE:BK) are set to announce their earnings on July 12. Following closely are reports from Goldman Sachs Inc. (NYSE:GS) on July 15 and Bank of America Corp. (NYSE:BAC) on July 16. Ramsden highlighted the positive impact of the extended high interest rate environment on asset repricing and slowing deposit costs. A 7% year-on-year (YoY) revenue growth is anticipated on average for banks in the upcoming quarter. Trading revenue is expected to be a strong segment with an average growth of 6% in Q2 2024 and 3% for the entire year, compared to 2% in the previous quarter.

news.headline: Partnership with Eight Sleep and EF Pro Cycling to optimize Tour De France recovery using Pod 4 technology, adding extra hour of sleep per night and reducing wake time by up to 3 hours/month.
news.summary: In New York, Eight Sleep, a top sleep fitness company, revealed that the EF Education - EasyPost team will utilize its state-of-the-art Pod 4 technology during the upcoming 2024 Tour de France. Serving as the Official Sleep Partner, Eight Sleep will supply the team with their acclaimed Pods to boost their recovery and performance. The innovative system aims to enhance sleep quality, potentially increasing nightly sleep duration by an hour and cutting down wake time by as much as three hours monthly.

news.headline: Deutsche Bank appointed successor depositary bank for ABB Ltd's ADR program (OTC: ABBNY), a tech company in electrification and automation.
news.summary: Deutsche Bank has been selected as the new depositary bank for the sponsored American Depositary Receipt Program of ABB Ltd (OTC: ABBNY). ABB Ltd is a tech company focusing on electrification and automation, aiming for a more sustainable future. Their solutions merge engineering expertise with software to enhance manufacturing, transportation, power, and operations. Past their specialty in cross-border services, ABB Ltd has a vast global presence with significant impact.

news.headline: Rogers Corp (NYSE: ROG) releases 2024 ESG Report, showcasing commitment to sustainability and corporate responsibility.
news.summary: In Chandler, Arizona, Rogers Corporation (NYSE: ROG) unveiled its 2024 Environmental, Social, and Governance Report (ESG). Colin Gouveia, President and CEO of Rogers, expressed satisfaction in presenting the latest ESG report, emphasizing Rogers' dedication to corporate responsibility and sustainability. The report showcases the substantial advancements made in ESG endeavors over the past year, underscoring Rogers' steadfast commitment to operating in a socially and environmentally responsible manner.

news.headline: Barnes & Noble Education reported FY 2024 revenue of $1.57 billion, up 1.6% primarily due to a 48% growth in First Day Com.
news.summary: Barnes & Noble Education, Inc., a prominent education industry solutions provider, released its sales and earnings report for fiscal year 2024 ending on April 27, 2024. The GAAP results from continuing operations show a 1.6% revenue increase to $1.57 billion. This growth was largely attributed to a significant 48% increase in First Day Com. It is important to note that Adjusted EBITDA is a non-GAAP calculation.

news.headline: Frontier Communications completed $750 million fiber securitization and term loan refinancing, showcasing the value of its assets.
news.summary: Frontier Communications Parent, Inc. (NASDAQ: FYBR) disclosed the finalization of its latest fiber securitization notes offering, marking its second such activity. This move underscores the enduring worth of Frontier's fiber assets and its adeptness in tapping into investment grade capital. The successful completion of this securitization offering within a year showcases the company's continued growth strategy.

news.headline: HOOKIPA Pharma initiates Phase 1b trial for HIV vaccine, dose first person, earn $5M milestone.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, HOOKIPA Pharma Inc. revealed that they have initiated a Phase 1b clinical trial for HB-500, a potential therapeutic vaccine targeting HIV, with the dosing of the first participant in New York and Vienna on July 1, 2024. The company specializes in developing immunotherapeutics using their unique arenavirus platform. Moreover, this milestone has triggered a $5 million non-dilutive payment for HOOKIPA through their partnership with Gilead.

news.headline: SEE will release Q2 2024 results on Aug 8 at 7:00 a.m. (ET) and host conference call at 10 a.m. (ET).
news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina, on July 1, 2024, SEE (NYSE: SEE) revealed plans to unveil its second quarter 2024 results at around 7:00 a.m. Eastern Time on Thursday, August 8, 2024. Following this release, a conference call and webcast are scheduled for 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Additionally, the conference will be available for viewing via webcast.

news.headline: Principal Real Estate Income Fund declares monthly distributions of $0.105 per share on NYSE under symbol "PGZ."
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, the Principal Real Estate Income Fund disclosed that it will be issuing monthly distributions of $0.105 per common share. These distributions will be payable on specific dates in the near future. The Fund can be found on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol "PGZ."

news.headline: MGIC to release Q2 2024 financial results on July 31, 2024, with conference call scheduled at 10:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, MGIC Investment Corporation (NYSE: MTG) revealed their intention to disclose the financial results for the second quarter of 2024 post-market closure on July 31, 2024. This disclosure will be followed by a conference call/webcast slated for 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time.

news.headline: Jerry Salinas, CFO of Cullen/Frost Bankers, Inc., to retire at end of 2024 after working at Frost since 1986.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Cullen/Frost Bankers, Inc. revealed that Jerry Salinas, the group executive vice president & chief financial officer, will retire by the end of 2024. Salinas, who has been with Frost Bank since 1986, will be stepping down after a long tenure with the company. Cullen/Frost Bankers, Inc., listed on the NYSE as CFR, is bidding farewell to a key member who has played a significant role in the organization for over three decades.

news.headline: Global nicotine gum market to grow by $1.34 billion from 2024-2028, fueled by more people attempting to quit smoking.
news.summary: According to a report by Technavio released on July 1, 2024, the global market for nicotine gum is projected to increase by USD 1.34 billion between 2024 and 2028. The market is expected to experience a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.71% during this period. This growth is primarily attributed to the rising number of individuals seeking to cease smoking.

news.headline: Schwazze transitions to OTC Expert Market as SHWZ due to SEC Form 10-Q delay, following BF Borgers dismissal.
news.summary: On July 01, 2024, Medicine Man Technologies, Inc., known as Schwazze, disclosed that its common stock, traded as SHWZ on OTCQX and Cboe CA, will move to the OTC Expert Market due to the delayed submission of its Form 10-Q for the period ending March 31, 2024, to the SEC. This delay was attributed to an SEC directive regarding the dismissal of the Company's former auditor, BF Borgers CPA PC. The transition to the OTC Expert Market was further reinforced by the pending submission of the required financial statements and the process necessary for compliance with regulatory standards.

news.headline: Universal Stainless extends labor contract with Local 2332-2 at North Jackson facility for 17 days, allowing time for negotiations.
news.summary: In Bridgeville, PA, on July 1, 2024, Universal Stainless & Alloy Products, Inc. (Nasdaq: USAP) announced a 17-day extension to the collective bargaining agreement with Local 2332-2 of the United Steelworkers. The agreement applies to the hourly production and maintenance staff at the North Jackson facility. Either party can issue a 7-day termination notice. This extension allows for further discussions to reach a labor agreement satisfactory to both parties.
